case_title: IN RE: ANGELA LA VIELA COTTEN

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER COTTEN, ANGELA LA VIELA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PETITIONER ANGELA LA VIELA COTTEN WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. NO OBJECTIONS TO THE PROPOSED CHANGE OF NAME WERE MADE AT THE HEARING. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE ALLEGATIONS IN THE PETITION ARE TRUE, CORRECT AND SUFFICIENT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. DECREE CHANGING NAME AND GENDER WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-08-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

DECLARATION OF MICHAEL L. BROWNSTEIN - PHYSCIAN DOCUMENTING CHANGE OF GENDER THROUGH SURGICAL TREATMENT UNDER HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 103425 AND 103430 FILED BY PETITIONER COTTEN, ANGELA LA VIELA

GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER IS CONTINUED FOR A SPECIALLY SET HEARING TO MONDAY, MAY 12, 2008 @ 9:00 A.M. NO FURTHER PUBLICATION IS REQUIRED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.

calendar.matters:
Reissued Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name And Gender. Specially Set.
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Angela La Viela Cotten was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.
Declaration of Physician Documenting Change of Gender Through Surgical Treatment under Health and Safety Code Sections 103425 and 103430 was filed today, May 12, 2008.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Trystan Theosophus Cotten.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Decree Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name Gender and issuance of a new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Angela La Viela Cotten was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file, but petitioner did not have a declaration from his treating physician as required by law.

Good cause appearing, Order to Show Cause for Change of Name and Gender is continued for a specially set hearing to Monday, May 12, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. No further publication is required.

Reissued Order to Show Cause was submitted to and signed by the Court.
